I can schedule that — a quick clarification before I create the event.

I checked your calendar for 2024-05-19:
- 10:00–11:00 — Project Kick-off (conflict)
- 11:00–11:30 — One-on-One with Manager (conflict)

So 10:00 is not available. Available 1-hour slots that day (based on current calendar) include:
- 09:00–10:00
- 11:30–12:30
- Any later time (afternoon) if you prefer — let me know a preferred range.

Please confirm the following (or tell me any changes):
1. Which time to use instead of 10:00: 09:00, 11:30, or a different time (specify).
2. Meeting title (default: "Follow-up Meeting").
3. Short description to include (suggestion I can use: "Follow-up to review progress and agree next steps.").
4. Participants to invite (email addresses). If you don’t provide any, I’ll create it on your calendar only.
5. Location or virtual link (e.g., "Office 44A" or "Teams/Zoom").

Once you confirm, I’ll create the one-hour event and invite participants.
